program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Implement the HermesGate tenant scope field only, using canonical lfos_ tenant_id values and same-tenant context checks before Matter trace and full HermesGate model behavior are implemented.
implemented_changes: Moves the current control-plane subphase to RP00.P01.M03.S03 in implemented state.

Adds HERMES_GATE_TENANT_SCOPE_POLICY for the HermesGate tenant_id field with required canonical lfos_ tenant IDs, same-tenant invariant, cross-tenant failure mode, forbidden forms, no-real-data/no-write boundaries, and next boundary RP00.P01.M03.S04.
Adds normalizeHermesGateTenantId, validateHermesGateTenantId, and assertHermesGateTenantScope exports with fail-closed tenant handling.
Exposes hermesGateTenantScopePolicy through CONTROL_PLANE_DOMAIN_MODEL_REGISTRY while keeping the HermesGate entity implementedInFutureSubphase=true and implementedSubphase=null.
Extends the synthetic fixture with hermes_gate_tenant_scope evidence bound to gate_id hg_rp00_h00_control_plane and tenant_id lfos_demo_tenant_layout.
Extends the RP00 validator and README with machine checks for the HermesGate tenant scope field slice.
non_goals: Does not implement HermesGate Matter trace reference, lifecycle status enum, ownership metadata, reference relationship map, required/optional field registry, state transition map, validation helper, factory, or full HermesGate model.
Does not execute production mutation or runtime target writes.
Does not import or use real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data.
Does not weaken or re-open ProductContract, AIControlRule, HermesGate package-layout, or HermesGate identifier production_ready slices.
Does not implement ClaudeReviewGate, HumanApproval, or BlockedClaim.
Does not replace H00, C00, or human approval.
Does not close RP00.P01, RP00, or RP00.P01.M03.S04.
claude_questions: Does RP00.P01.M03.S03 implement only the HermesGate tenant scope field and avoid claiming full HermesGate model completion?

Does HERMES_GATE_TENANT_SCOPE_POLICY enforce tenant_id, lfos_ stable prefix, lowercase snake-case canonical pattern, same-tenant checks, no-real-data/no-write boundaries, and next boundary RP00.P01.M03.S04?

Do normalizeHermesGateTenantId, validateHermesGateTenantId, and assertHermesGateTenantScope accept same-tenant fixture context, reject stored whitespace, and reject noncanonical or cross-tenant values?
Does CONTROL_PLANE_DOMAIN_MODEL_REGISTRY expose hermesGateTenantScopePolicy while keeping the HermesGate entity future-only with implementedSubphase=null?

Does the synthetic fixture record hermes_gate_tenant_scope with gate_id=hg_rp00_h00_control_plane, tenant_id=lfos_demo_tenant_layout, policy_ref=HERMES_GATE_TENANT_SCOPE_POLICY, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false, and next_subphase=RP00.P01.M03.S04?

Does the validator enforce S03 exports, fixture evidence, cross-tenant rejection, no-write policy, actual Claude dependency, construction inspection, and next-boundary evidence before production_ready?
risk_focus: Accidentally claiming HermesGate full model completion from a tenant-scope-only slice.
Accepting noncanonical or cross-tenant tenant IDs that would weaken evidence, command, blocked-claim, and closeout isolation.
Advancing Matter trace or model validation before RP00.P01.M03.S04-S11.
Skipping actual Claude C00 review or construction inspection before production_ready.
